gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.TransactionID) FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date = '2012-08-26' AND T1.Time < '13:00:00' AND T2.Currency = 'CZK'
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.TransactionID) FROM transactions_1k T1 JOIN customers C ON T1.CustomerID = C.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date = '2012-08-26' AND CAST(T1.Time AS INTEGER) < 130000 AND C.Currency = 'CZK'
question: How many transactions were paid in CZK in the morning of 2012/8/26?
